[![D-Wave](https://www.dwavequantum.com/images/landing-pages/D-Wave_Logo.svg)](https://www.dwavequantum.com/)
Quantum Circuits Is Now Part of D-Wave
Quantum Circuits Inc. has been by D-Wave, bringing together the world’s leading developer of error-corrected gate-model technology with the world’s leading annealing quantum computing company. This solidifies D-Wave’s position as the world’s first and only dual-platform quantum computing company, building annealing and gate-model systems to address the full range of customers’ complex computational problems.
**What does this mean for you?**
  * More quantum power, one unified team: The deep superconducting research and talent from Quantum Circuits strengthens D-Wave’s full-stack quantum platform for customers in business, research, and the public sector.
  * A faster path from experimentation to application: D-Wave combines advanced hardware, cloud service, hybrid solvers, and enterprise-ready tools to help you accelerate to production use.


Whether you’re tackling complex enterprise or public sector problems or advancing groundbreaking scientific research, D-Wave is here to help you move forward—now.
"With aggressive roadmaps for both annealing and gate-model technology and a common track record of technology delivery, Quantum Circuits and D-Wave together are in a unique position to address the full spectrum of quantum computing technology."  
  
— **Dr.** **Rob Schoelkopf** , co-founder of Quantum Circuits and now chief scientist at D-Wave

Quantum Circuits Is Now Part of D-Wave

Quantum Circuits Inc. has been acquired by D-Wave, bringing together the world’s leading developer of error-corrected gate-model technology with the world’s leading annealing quantum computing company. This solidifies D-Wave’s position as the world’s first and only dual-platform quantum computing company, building annealing and gate-model systems to address the full range of customers’ complex computational problems. 

What does this mean for you?

  • More quantum power, one unified team: The deep superconducting research and talent from Quantum Circuits strengthens D-Wave’s full-stack quantum platform for customers in business, research, and the public sector.
  • A faster path from experimentation to application: D-Wave combines advanced hardware, cloud service, hybrid solvers, and enterprise-ready tools to help you accelerate to production use.

Whether you’re tackling complex enterprise or public sector problems or advancing groundbreaking scientific research, D-Wave is here to help you move forward—now.

"With aggressive roadmaps for both annealing and gate-model technology and a common track record of technology delivery, Quantum Circuits and D-Wave together are in a unique position to address the full spectrum of quantum computing technology."

— Dr. Rob Schoelkopf, co-founder of Quantum Circuits and now chief scientist at D-Wave
